scripts.dev: lsof -ti:5001 | xargs kill -9 || true && concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix admin"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix admin
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix admin
